videos.headline: Coastal Carolina takes blocked punt in for a TD
videos.description: Alex Spillum blocks the punt by Reis Vernon and recovers it in the end zone for a Coastal Carolina touchdown as they take a 21-9 lead over Kansas.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Coastal Carolina takes blocked punt in for a TD) 2021/09/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Devin Neal breaks through for short Kansas TD
videos.description: Devin Neal takes the handoff and fights his way through traffic to score a 2-yard touchdown for Kansas as they take a 9-7 lead over Coastal Carolina.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Devin Neal breaks through for short Kansas TD) 2021/09/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Grayson McCall spins into the end zone for Coastal Carolina
videos.description: Grayson McCall keeps the ball on the option and uses a spin move to evade defenders and reach the end zone to score a 2-yard touchdown for Coastal Carolina.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Grayson McCall spins into the end zone for Coastal Carolina) 2021/09/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Coastal Carolina scores TD to extend lead to 28-9 over Kansas
videos.description: Reese White takes the handoff and navigates his way to a 2-yard touchdown to extend Coastal Carolina's lead to 28-9 over Kansas.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Coastal Carolina scores TD to extend lead to 28-9 over Kansas) 2021/09/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jason Bean jets to score 34-yard Kansas TD
videos.description: Jason Bean escapes the pocket and evades defenders as he traverses the field 34 yards to score a Kansas touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jason Bean jets to score 34-yard Kansas TD) 2021/09/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jason Bean takes off for 46-yard Kansas TD
videos.description: Jason Bean takes the snap and bursts down the field to score a 46-yard touchdown for Kansas.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jason Bean takes off for 46-yard Kansas TD) 2021/09/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Reese White goes 19 yards for Coastal Carolina TD
videos.description: Reese White gets the shovel pass from Grayson McCall and makes his way down the field to score a 19-yard touchdown for Coastal Carolina.
